mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report a ladder fall injury to my employer in Boise?
mainEntity.text: How long do I have to report a ladder fall injury to my employer in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Idaho (Boise), report workplace injuries like ladder falls to your employer within 60 days; workers' comp claims must be filed within 1 year from injury date. Delays can bar benefits.

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho Code §72-702 requires notice to employer within 60 days of a ladder fall. File Form 1 with surety/employer within 1 year. Late notices may be excused if employer had actual knowledge. For Boise cases, document everything immediately to avoid denials common in construction ladder claims.

name: Reporting Deadlines for Ladder Fall Injuries in Boise
description: In Idaho (Boise), report workplace injuries like ladder falls to your employer within 60 days; workers' comp claims must be filed within 1 year from injury date
